pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh OUTPUT_FILE variable
setup_task.sh script which creates the CSV at this exact path
Task description mandates instructions (Text), waiting for key (Keyboard), fixation cross (Text), Dots RDK (Dots), and response collection (Keyboard)
setup_task.sh generated CSV headers and task description variable requirements

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a PsychoPy experiment saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/motion_coherence.psyexp. The conditions file is dynamically generated at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/motion_conditions.csv and contains the variables 'coherence', 'direction', and 'corrAns'. The experiment must include Dots, Keyboard, and Text components.
